freshlineOrderUrl.title: Freshline Order URL
freshlineOrderUrl.description: Full URL to the Freshline order page

files.title: File URLs
files.description: Comma-separated list of public URLs to files to attach to the order. Also accepts a JSON array.

names.title: File Names
names.description: Optional comma-separated list of filenames, matched by position to file URLs. If omitted, filenames are derived from the URLs. Also accepts a JSON array.
